name: Joravar Singh Deora
notes: Left Sirohi Darbar. Became Nath Ji Maharaj of Jaiti Dhooni. Later moved to Kanuja where he founded the Deora Parivar. Samadhi Sthal: Katola, Kanuja.

children.name: Aiji Kahn Nath Deora
children.notes: Was Bal-brahmchari, never married. Was Ajiji Maharaj of Asarlai Dhooni. Samadhi: Asarlai Mandir.

children.name: Aiji Uday Nath Deora
children.notes: Was Aiji of Asan Jilelav. Samadhi: Asan Jilelav.

children.name: Hukam Nath Deora
children.notes: Died in childhood by falling into an open well (Shiv Sagar) in front of Shiv Mandir.

children.name: Mishri Nath Deora
children.notes: Lived a simple life with no worries in mind. Married twice: first to Naini Devi, then to Soni Devi. Samadhi: Kathola, Kanuja.

children.name: Kheem Nath Deora
children.notes: Was very kind as well as very dominant when needed. Samadhi: Kathola, Kanuja.

children.name: Shiv Nath Deora
children.notes: Died in a battle at Buti-Vas. Samadhi location: Pali (given by Hameer Nath Ji). Adopted Harji Nath Deora in 1946.

children.name: Harji Nath Deora
children.notes: Adopted by Shiv Nath Deora and Bhanwari Devi in 1946. Biological son of Sanjay Nath Deora and Ganga Devi. Became Headmaster and contributed significantly in field of education. Known for his contributions by all. Samadhi: Dharmtalai, Kanuja.
